creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:
(In reply to alt2600 from comment #2)

actually I just recalled, I hadn't had tiledb installed for quite a while due to a crazy bug I ran into with firefox loading it instead of sqllite it seems. seems as though tiledb has had the issue of forced AVX for quite some time, I just ran into it when I was contacted on another PR and found it wasn't a problem anymore.

PR 252633 , this doesn't seem to break firefox, so I installed to gain the tiledb option in gdal again when I ran into this issue. as I indicated above, haven't heard anything so closing this as not a bug, as grass didn't cause the issue.
